flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Hood College fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (56.2% → 43.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Hood College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (66.0% → 56.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Hood College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($43.1k → $47.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Hood College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($43.1k → $47.7k).
